message:
fix: prevent division by zero and memory leaks

- job.service.ts: Guard against division by zero in progress calculations
  when total is 0 (would produce NaN/Infinity)
- safety.service.ts: Add cleanup job to prevent unbounded memory growth
  from accumulated rate limit and budget entries
- idempotency.ts: Fix singleton cleanup interval (was creating multiple
  intervals if middleware mounted multiple times), improve type safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
